name: Fish tank Aquarium Game
description: The fish aquarium game is taking care of your own pet fish and building an aquarium for your precious fish. It sounds like fun, doesn’t it? Well, now you can be a proud owner of your own fish tank, take care of fish, and even become a fish doctor! All you need to do is download **Fish Aquarium Game Decorate free, and your aquarium adventure can start! Fish Aquarium is the latest advance in fish simulations. Enjoy plenty of freshwater and saltwater fish, including seahorses, whales, dolphins, sharks, starfish, jellyfish, rays, and turtles.
instructions: Mouse operated - Tap on the food container to drop fish food and click on the fish to hunt
